message: SFX coverage drift: 7 key game moments (encounter, success, fail, card reveal) play silently
details: Audit found 7 sound names called in UI/3D scripts (encounter_card_overlay, book_cinematic, tutorial_card_layer, broceliande_forest_3d) but not registered in SFXManager. Silent fail at key emotional moments: card reveals, encounter triggers, minigame results. BUG-SFX-MISSING-SOUNDS (P5) will fix. Root cause: new callers added without updating _generate_all_sounds() names array — a coverage drift problem. Suggest: add a static assert or comment at top of SFXManager listing ALL expected sound names so future callers can verify at a glance.

proposed_task.title: Add SFX names table comment header in SFXManager._generate_all_sounds()

message: 192 hardcoded French strings detected across 15 files
details: text_registry.json created with ~80 keys. Remaining ~120 strings in merlin_constants.gd (oghams, biomes, talents, verbs) need migration. Priority: UI strings first, then game data.

proposed_task.title: Migrate remaining 120 strings to text_registry.json

message: No visual test baseline exists — screenshot pipeline ready but untested
details: screenshot_agent.gd and visual_test_runner.py created. Need to run first baseline capture on MerlinGame.tscn and Hub scene to establish reference screenshots.

proposed_task.title: Run first visual test baseline on 3 core scenes

message: Triplanar shaders too heavy for mobile — need LOD fallbacks
details: low_poly.shader uses multiple texture fetches and depth blending. Mobile devices will struggle. Recommend shader variant with single texture + flat shading for QualityLevel.LOW.

proposed_task.title: Create mobile-friendly shader variant for LOW quality

message: dominant_faction biome routing injected but not yet wired into trigger evaluation
details: enriched_run now carries dominant_faction (e.g. 'korrigans' in marais). _evaluate_triggers() does not yet use it — event sub-types with high faction rep for the biome's dominant faction don't get automatic weight bonuses on entry. Adding a trigger condition using enriched_run['dominant_faction'] + enriched_run['factions'][dominant_faction] would make biome entry feel faction-aware without any JSON config change needed.

proposed_task.title: S3-DOMINANT-FACTION-TRIGGER: wire dominant_faction into _evaluate_triggers bonus

message: Faction system fully operational — AI subsystems now receive live rep data for the first time
details: Prior to BUG-FACTIONS-STALE-FIX, all AI orchestration (omniscient, event router, RAG, context builder, LLM adapter) saw faction_rep as zeros for all runs. With fix confirmed, the game now has a complete data pipeline: player choices → effect engine → meta.faction_rep → all 5 AI systems. First time this full loop is functional. High-value test would be a narrative coherence check: do event categories actually change when one faction reaches 70+ reputation?

proposed_task.title: Test narrative coherence with high faction rep (manual or simulated run)

message: run.day always shows 1 — LLM temporal narrative broken
details: run.day is initialized to 1 in store_run.gd but never incremented. Every card the LLM receives shows 'Jour 1, N cartes jouees'. Narrative has no temporal progression — a 50-card run feels like Day 1 forever. S2-DAY-TICK-FIX task created (P8). Recommended: 1 day per 3 cards (configurable CARDS_PER_DAY constant). Also affects build_llm_prompt_context which always renders day as '1'.

proposed_task.title: S2-DAY-TICK-FIX: increment run.day per N cards in resolve_choice()

message: Vestigial gauges_changed signal + MerlinGaugeSystem in merlin_store.gd may be dead code
details: S2-CONTEXT-REGRESSION-TEST SF-001: merlin_store.gd still declares gauges_changed signal (line 23) and emits it via StoreMap.update_gauges (line 434). MerlinGaugeSystem.new().build_default_gauges() is called in dispatch handler. If StoreMap and MerlinGaugeSystem are not used elsewhere, this is dead code that could be removed in S2-DEAD-FILES scope. If map/progression gauges are an intentional separate system (not card-cycle gauges), it is benign.

proposed_task.title: Audit MerlinGaugeSystem + StoreMap — add to S2-DEAD-FILES or keep

message: mg_meditation.gd is a functional script with no dispatch path — pending director placement decision (q-20260413-004)
details: After GAMES['esprit'] aligned to bible s.6.2, mg_meditation no longer dispatched. Script preserved, preload in match block retained. Director must decide: keep as bonus in esprit, move to perception/logique, or add to bible. Task will be created once answered.

proposed_task.title: Add mg_meditation to GAMES field per director q-20260413-004

message: Signal delta accuracy restored: reputation UI will now show correct faction changes
details: BUG-SIGNAL-DELTA-FIX corrected reputation_changed signal. Previously UI listeners received raw requested delta (up to ±20 even if capped). Now they receive the true applied change. This matters for reputation animation smoothness and achievement tracking (e.g., earned +5 rep at cap, not +20).

proposed_task.title: Add reputation cap visual indicator when delta is clamped

message: arc_condition_type field in BIOMES now has 4 distinct types but evaluator only handles 2
details: S2-BIOMES introduced 'runs_in_biome' and 'fins_vues' condition types (landes_bruyere and collines_dolmens arcs). The evaluation code in merlin_skeleton_generator.gd and llm_adapter_map_prompt.gd only handles 'faction_rep' and 'oghams_owned'. Until S2-ARC-CONDITION-EVAL is implemented, these two biomes will never unlock their arcs regardless of player progress. This is a silent logic bug.

proposed_task.title: Implement arc_condition_type evaluators: runs_in_biome + fins_vues

message: dominant_faction should align with arc_condition_faction across all biomes
details: S2-BIOMES-REGRESSION-TEST found cotes_sauvages.dominant_faction='korrigans' while arc unlock requires Rep Niamh >= 30. When dominant_faction and arc_condition_faction diverge, the LLM context sent before arc-unlock may contradict the arc narrative (routing as korrigans while unlocking via niamh). A single-pass audit of all 8 biomes to verify dominant_faction thematic coherence is recommended.

proposed_task.title: Fix cotes_sauvages.dominant_faction: korrigans → niamh

message: 7 game-flow SFX sounds were silently missing — no crash, but UX degradation at key moments
details: SFXManager.play() returns silently when a name is not registered. This means card reveals, encounter entries, success/fail outcomes, danger warnings, and confirm actions had zero audio feedback. The silent-fail design is intentional for robustness, but it means missing sounds can go undetected indefinitely without static auditing. Consider adding a startup warning log when a registered caller name is not found in names[].

proposed_task.title: SFXManager: warn on unregistered sound at startup (debug mode)

message: Anam death penalty bypassed by in-run ADD_ANAM card effects — design ambiguity needs director decision
details: The bible formula 'Mort = Anam × min(cartes/30, 1.0)' is ambiguous about scope. Currently ADD_ANAM from card effects is credited to meta['anam'] immediately (permanent, no death penalty). Only the base run-end reward (ANAM_BASE_REWARD=10 + bonuses) is scaled by the death ratio. Impact: a player who earns 30 Anam from card choices then dies at card 5 keeps all 30 Anam. If the bible intent is that early-run deaths should yield less total Anam, this needs a fix. If immediate card rewards are intentionally 'confirmed' gains (rewarding smart individual choices regardless of run outcome), no change needed. Director decision requested via q-20260414-001.

proposed_task.title: BUG-ANAM-DEATH-PENALTY-FIX: scope ADD_ANAM under death ratio

message: Day counter now ticks every 5 cards — consider showing the current day in the LLM prompt and HUD
details: S2-DAY-TICK-FIX implemented run['day'] increment (every CARDS_PER_DAY=5 cards). The day value is already passed via run state to LLM context but the HUD may not display it. Exposing 'Jour N' in the card display header would give players a sense of run progression and align with the narrative 'Jour 1' references in generated text.

proposed_task.title: Display current in-game day in HUD card header

message: meta.biome_run_counts + meta.fins_vues may not be initialized — arc conditions for landes + collines silently fail
details: S2-ARC-CONDITION-EVAL (P16) will add evaluators for 'runs_in_biome' and 'fins_vues' arc condition types. However, if meta.biome_run_counts (dict) and meta.fins_vues (int) are not initialized in init_meta() and not incremented at run-end, the evaluators will always see zero and arcs will never unlock. The S2-ARC-CONDITION-EVAL task description must explicitly include: (1) init_meta() field initialization, (2) apply_run_rewards() increment logic. T-S2-ARC-EVAL-TEST (P19) will catch this if missed.

proposed_task.title: Ensure meta.biome_run_counts + meta.fins_vues are initialized and incremented in apply_run_rewards()

message: Anam accumulation during run bypasses death penalty — pending director decision
details: ADD_ANAM card effects currently credit meta['anam'] immediately during the run, bypassing the death ratio min(cards/30, 1.0). Bible s.5.1 implies all run anam should be scaled at death. Director question q-20260414-001 is pending. Once answered, BUG-ANAM-DEATH-PENALTY-FIX (P10) should be unblocked. If director chooses option A (immediate gain), the current behavior is correct. If option B or C, _apply_add_anam() must write to run['anam_accumulated'] and NOT meta['anam'] during the run.

proposed_task.title: Unblock BUG-ANAM-DEATH-PENALTY-FIX after q-20260414-001 answered

message: Save schema _validate() is out of sync with _get_default_profile() — fins_vues and echo_memory not in required_keys
details: SPECIALIST-9 audit: _validate() checks 12 required keys but _get_default_profile() has 17 top-level fields. Fields added in recent cycles (fins_vues, echo_memory, run_history, whispers_seen) are not validated. Recommend: update required_keys every time a semantically important field is added to _get_default_profile().

proposed_task.title: Add fins_vues + echo_memory to _validate() required_keys

message: run['anam'] is a write-only vestigial field — never consumed by rewards pipeline
details: PAT-045 finding: _apply_add_anam() writes to run['anam'] (tracking in-run ADD_ANAM gains) but calculate_run_rewards() and apply_run_rewards() never read this field. The rewards pipeline computes anam from scratch (ANAM_BASE_REWARD + bonuses). This means run.anam tracks something useful (cumulative ADD_ANAM during run) but the data goes nowhere. When q-20260414-001 resolves, this field should either become 'anam_accumulated' (if option B/C chosen) or be removed entirely (if option A chosen — immediate gain is already applied to meta.anam). The current dual-write pattern (run.anam + meta.anam simultaneously) is redundant.

message: Documentation lag: 3 docs/*.md files still reference deleted mg_meditation (and potentially other deleted systems)
details: T-S3-MEDITATION-VERIFY found that docs/GAME_BEHAVIOR.md, docs/20_card_system/DOC_MINIGAMES.md, and docs/GAME_ENCYCLOPEDIA.md still document mg_meditation as an active minigame. With 18+ cleanup cycles, similar doc lag likely exists for other deleted systems (Triade, Souffle, 4 Jauges, etc). A docs-audit cycle could clean all doc references to deleted systems in one pass — improves onboarding clarity for future contributors.

proposed_task.title: Docs audit: remove all references to deleted systems (Triade, Souffle, mg_meditation, etc.)

message: merlin_ai.gd + merlin_omniscient.gd are 5000+ lines combined — technical debt accumulation risk
details: SPECIALIST-10 audit found merlin_omniscient.gd at 2951 lines and merlin_ai.gd at 2235 lines (combined 5186 lines). 7 PERF tasks (P24-P29) propose incremental splits. Prioritize PERF-REDUCE-MEGAFUNC (P24) and PERF-AI-PROCESS-EXTRACT (P27) as quick wins in S3.

proposed_task.title: S4 module split: omniscient_card_gen + omniscient_guardrails + omniscient_arc

message: Arc gating system broken for 3 biomes — arcs always unlocked
details: merlin_skeleton_generator.gd context dict never passes biome_runs, fins_vues, or oghams_count. When arc_condition_faction is empty, rep_value defaults to FACTION_SCORE_START=20, satisfying all non-faction arc conditions (runs_in_biome>=3, fins_vues>=5, oghams_owned>=2). Progression system gate for landes_bruyere, collines_dolmens, cercles_pierres is non-functional. Players see narrative arcs they haven't 'earned' per game design bible.

proposed_task.title: S2-ARC-CONDITION-EVAL (already queued, bumped P2)

message: Minigame difficulty is hardcoded at 5 for all cards — no progression curve
details: game_controller_minigame.gd:47 always uses base_diff=5. Bible s.6.3 specifies difficulty scales with card type and biome maturity. Players experience identical challenge on card 1 and card 40 of a run. The MOS tracks engagement but can't respond with increasing difficulty. Adding a simple card_count→difficulty lookup (5+floor(cards_played/10), capped at 10) would improve late-game tension.

proposed_task.title: Difficulty curve: scale base_diff with cards_played and biome tier

message: 7 of 8 biomes have zero 3D assets — only foret_broceliande populated
details: Assets/bk_assets/ only has foret_broceliande assets. landes_bruyere, cotes_sauvages, villages_celtes, cercles_pierres, marais_korrigans, collines_dolmens, iles_mystiques all use procedural fallback geometry when run. Two Blender generation tasks (3D-BIOME-ASSET-GEN-LANDES, 3D-BIOME-ASSET-GEN-COTES) added to generate assets for priority biomes.

proposed_task.title: Blender: gen all 7 missing biome asset sets

message: Two parallel game flow paths exist — active vs dead code drift risk
details: ACTIVE path: IntroCeltOS→Menu3DPC→SelectionSauvegarde→HubAntre→BroceliandeForest3D→MerlinGame. DEAD path: game_flow_controller.gd (HubScreen→Run3D→EndRunScreen), audio_integration.gd wires to it but no production code instantiates GameFlowController. As features are added to the active path, the dead path will drift further. Risk: a future developer might try to use the dead path and find broken wiring. Recommendation: director decision needed (delete vs document vs migrate).

proposed_task.title: Director decision: delete/document/migrate GameFlowController dead path

message: Studio tracking has 7-cycle metric drift: completed_archive has 2/62 tasks, learnings cycle count 7 behind events.jsonl
details: Housekeeping (cycle_instructions.md section 'Queue cleanup') requires moving completed tasks to completed_archive.json each cycle. 60 tasks are unarchived. Also studio_learnings.json total_cycles drifted to 40 while events.jsonl has 47. META-ARCHIVE-RECOVER and META-LEARNINGS-SYNC tasks queued.

proposed_task.title: Recover 60 missing tasks into completed_archive.json

message: IntroPersonalityQuiz + SceneRencontreMerlin are orphaned from new game flow
details: SPEC-0 audit found that Menu3DPC._start_new_game() routes to ParchmentPreRun, completely skipping IntroPersonalityQuiz.tscn and SceneRencontreMerlin.tscn. These scenes implement the bible-mandated player onboarding (personality quiz → meeting Merlin → Hub 2D). New players never experience the narrative intro. Director feedback q-20260414-005 asks whether to re-wire, delete, or accept the current ParchmentPreRun replacement.

proposed_task.title: Wire IntroPersonalityQuiz into new game flow (first-run detection)

message: Faction endings (rep ≥ 80) are defined but never triggered — core feature missing
details: FACTION_THRESHOLD_ENDING=80 is in constants, 5 faction endings are designed (bible s.5.2), but check_run_end() never checks faction rep. Players can reach rep 80 without ever seeing the faction ending. This is a core gameplay loop completion gap — the 'Fin Druides/Anciens/etc.' endings are promised but inaccessible.

proposed_task.title: GDC-FACTION-ENDING-TRIGGER: Add faction rep >= 80 check in check_run_end()

message: DAMAGE_LIFE effect dispatched with no audio feedback — player loses life silently
details: game_controller_effects.gd:187 dispatches DAMAGE_LIFE for passive biome damage and other sources, but no 'danger' or 'error' SFX is played. The player receives no audio confirmation of life loss, which weakens the emotional impact of survival mechanics. Only shield blocks get skill_activate SFX (line 34). Fix: add SFXManager.play('danger') after DAMAGE_LIFE dispatch.

proposed_task.title: Add danger SFX on DAMAGE_LIFE

message: BrocScreenVfx screen effects are silently broken — shader never attached
details: broc_screen_vfx.gd:46 has a comment saying the shader was removed because ColorRect TEXTURE defaults to white. This causes all glitch/flash/vignette calls to be no-ops. The ps1_material.gdshader is also very minimal (missing affine warp) given the director PS1 mandate. Both are HIGH priority VFX failures visible every play session.

proposed_task.title: VFX-SCREEN-VFX-REATTACH

message: i18n coverage gap: Collection.gd and HubAntre.gd have 16+ hardcoded French strings bypassing I18nRegistry
details: Collection.gd:504-600 and HubAntre.gd:848-926 contain player-visible strings hardcoded in French. These are active screens that players interact with during Hub exploration. The i18n_auditor_agent should run a comprehensive sweep of all scripts/ directory for text= assignments with French literals.

proposed_task.title: i18n_auditor_agent: sweep all scripts/ for hardcoded French user-facing text

message: Faction endings implemented in backend but missing UI — critical path incomplete
details: check_run_end() now returns faction_endings_available[] (bible s.3.8) but end_run_screen.gd has no code to display the faction choice. Players who earn faction rep >=80 see a normal ending instead of the special faction narrative. NAR-FACTION-ENDING-UI (P9) is the critical follow-up — it should be the NEXT cycle's task.

proposed_task.title: Faction ending choice screen UI implementation
